Home page/Industries/New Energy

New energy equipment and test parts manufacturing

Provide manufacturing support for structural parts, heat dissipation parts, fixtures and non-standard parts for energy storage, charging, photovoltaic and electric drive testing related equipment.

Heat dissipation structureinsulation materialCorrosion resistantNon-standard fixture

Key parts types

Focusing on equipment research and development, testing and manufacturing, it does not make any promises on electrical safety certification, overall machine performance or energy efficiency.

Heat dissipation and support structure

Aluminum heatsinks, mounting plates, brackets and machined housings take into account thermal conductivity, weight and assembly.

Insulation and isolation parts

Evaluate engineering plastics, composites and Surface Finishing options by temperature, strength and processability.

Test Fixtures

Supports positioning, compression and quick-change structures in battery, connector, module and device testing scenarios.

heat conductionMaterials and Surface Finishing jointly affect thermal stability.
insulationElectrical related requirements need to be verified in combination with design and testing.
Corrosion resistanceFor outdoor or humid environments, the protection plan must be confirmed in advance.
AssemblyHole positions, positioning surfaces and tolerance chains affect the assembly of the entire machine.

Review and deliver recommendations

Avoid energy efficiency commitmentsElectrical safety needs to be tested and confirmedEnvironmental conditions need to be explainedKey dimensions need to be marked on drawings

Evaluate the manufacturing feasibility of new energy equipment parts

Submit material, structure and application environment information to get clearer processing recommendations.
